caption: Adds a fourth arrow-key nudge direction: Up now forward-steps the selected regiment a small fixed distance, mirroring how Left/Right side-step and Down back-steps. A lone Spearmen regiment faces south; with it selected, a single tap of Up steps it forward along its own facing while holding that facing throughout -- the regiment does not turn to face the step, just as the existing side-step and back-step never do. While a unit is selected all four arrows now nudge instead of panning the camera; WASD still always pans.
